chosen.theme: Pakistan Rupee Near-Term Stability — IMF Program Anchor Holds USD/PKR Steady Amid Structural Fiscal Fragility
chosen.news_one_liner: Pakistan's rupee holds steady near PKR 279/USD, offering fragile relief for EM-exposed portfolios but structural fiscal risks and oil import costs remain.

candidates.theme: G7 Synchronized Rate Hold — Hormuz Energy Shock Locks All Major Central Banks Into Monetary Paralysis Simultaneously
candidates.news_one_liner: RBA joins G7 central banks hiking into an energy shock, extending the synchronized monetary paralysis thesis to developed markets beyond the G7 core as ASX rate-sensitive stocks sell off.

candidates.theme: US-EU Auto Tariff Escalation — Trump's 25% Tariff Threat Opens New Trade War Front Against Europe's Largest Export Sector
candidates.news_one_liner: Trump renewed 25% EU auto tariff threats just after the EU ratified a trade deal, destroying negotiation credibility and widening the trade war front against German automakers.

candidates.theme: Non-Tariff Barrier Trade Fragmentation — UNCTAD Quantifies 10% LDC Export Loss as Deglobalization Extends Beyond Tariff Disputes
candidates.news_one_liner: UNCTAD finds LDCs losing 10% of G20 exports to non-tariff barriers, deepening trade fragmentation beyond headline tariff disputes and pressuring EM commodity exporters.

candidates.theme: Pakistan Rupee Near-Term Stability — IMF Program Anchor Holds USD/PKR Steady Amid Structural Fiscal Fragility
candidates.news_one_liner: Pakistan's rupee holds steady near PKR 279/USD, offering fragile relief for EM-exposed portfolios but structural fiscal risks and oil import costs remain.

candidates.theme: African Mining Resource Nationalism Escalation — Ghana Localisation Policy Adds Regulatory Friction Layer for International Operators
candidates.news_one_liner: Ghana's US debt deal modestly reduces fiscal pressure driving aggressive resource nationalism, but localisation policy friction for gold miners like GDX and CCJ-adjacent operators remains structurally
